responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete IVX Holdings production acceptance (Build 35 done, verified) and fix P0 IVX Owner AI failures: OpenAI provider/model adapter mismatch and execution guard blocking valid developer output

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx`
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports
- Owner email: `Iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify EXISTING codebase only
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, tunnel URLs, or any Vercel hosting URL
- All `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` references fully removed — replaced with direct OpenAI API (`api.openai.com/v1`)
- All Rork references fully removed from Expo app and backend
- Do not mark anything "verified" without runtime evidence — code-level PASS is not runtime proof
- P0 recovery: DO NOT return plan only, DO NOT return narrative claims, DO NOT mark VERIFIED without real test evidence, DO NOT ask for credentials unless runtime request returns 401/403/expired/revoked
- P0 mandatory final response format required (TASK UNDERSTOOD, ROOT CAUSES, FILES INSPECTED, FILES CHANGED, etc.)

## Progress
### Done
- **Build 35 APK completed, uploaded, and verified end-to-end on physical device by owner**
  - APK: 84,589,615 bytes, SHA-256 `2d8a2b8aea776c9695bde8a03480a90284035def1db2d1f4869f842db42c3867`, versionCode 35
  - Download: `https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/releases/download/v1.4.3-build35/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build35.apk`
  - GitHub Release ID: 354803487, tag `v1.4.3-build35`
  - Embedded SHA: `9de5d8594dc73791b51ac02fa2c76c8c5d9379f8`, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_35_CRM_INDEPENDENT_TILES`
  - User confirmed: "Verified end to end"
  - Plan file `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md` updated with all items checked
- **CRM fix verified with live backend data** — authenticated as owner via Supabase magic link, hit all 5 CRM endpoints with real session token:
  - `/api/ivx/investors`: HTTP 200, 0 records (endpoint healthy)
  - `/api/ivx/capital-pipeline`: HTTP 200, **7 entries**, 1 active buyer, 5 active investors, 6 deals in progress
  - `/api/ivx/outreach`: HTTP 200, 0 messages (endpoint healthy)
  - `/api/ivx/deal-tracking`: HTTP 200, **22 deals**, 18 open, 3 closed_won, 1 closed_lost
  - `/api/ivx/deal-matching`: HTTP 200, 0 deal sets (endpoint healthy)
  - Owner user ID in Supabase: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, profile role=owner
- **Build 35 critical fix**: `crm.tsx` rewritten — each of 5 stat tiles has its own independent `useQuery` with per-tile cached-first AsyncStorage, per-tile skeleton/error states, pull-to-refresh. One slow/failing endpoint no longer blocks all 5 tiles.
- **expo-location physically removed** from `node_modules` to fix AGP 8.x incompatibility (was still autolinking despite `expo-modules.config.json` exclusion)
- **Build 34 completed and uploaded** — APK SHA-256 `b3b38fee...`, versionCode 34, Release ID 354781767. Superseded by Build 35.

### In Progress
- **P0 Recovery — Phase 1 baseline captured**:
  - Git HEAD: `3128057b166dec5ab5f2491ed99ac68180762574` (main branch)
  - Render `/health`: status=healthy, bootTime=2026-07-15T23:25:45.630Z, aiEnabled=true, openAIModel=gpt-4o, aiProvider=chatgpt, aiEndpoint=`https://api.openai.com/v1/gpt-4o`, routes=77
  - **ROOT CAUSE of FAILURE 1 (AI provider error)**: `ai@6.0.218` requires `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.13` (spec v3) but `@ai-sdk/openai@4.0.15` provides `@ai-sdk/provider@4.0.3` (spec v4). The `@ai-sdk/openai@4` adapter creates models using the Responses API (spec v4), but `ai@6`'s `generateText`/`streamText` only supports spec v3. Additionally, the endpoint is constructed as `https://api.openai.com/v1/gpt-4o` — treating the model name as an API route, which is invalid.
  - **ROOT CAUSE of FAILURE 2 (execution guard)**: `ivx-fake-execution-gate.ts` and `ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` use fragile narrative phrase detection that blocks valid in-progress text like "starting implementation" or "I will inspect" before the worker has executed. The guard validates narrative phrases instead of a structured result schema.
  - Key files identified and read: `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-fake-execution-gate.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-developer-proof-standard.ts`, `backend/api/owner-only.ts`
  - 25+ AI/provider/model/gateway files identified via grep
  - 25+ execution guard/developer worker files identified via grep

### Blocked
- **`backend/package.json` not found at expected path** — need to locate actual package.json for backend dependency management
- **Supabase password grant returns `unsupported_grant_type`** — password auth via `POST /auth/v1/token?grant=password` fails for owner account. Workaround: magic link via admin API + OTP verification works.

## Key Decisions
- `app.config.ts` SHA resolution: `EXPO_PUBLIC_SOURCE_COMMIT_SHA` env var takes priority over `git rev-parse HEAD` — needed because Rork git router rewrites commit SHAs on push
- CRM tiles split into independent queries — each tile has its own `useQuery` with unique `queryKey: ['crm-badge', '<tile>']`, cached-first from AsyncStorage, per-tile skeleton/error states
- `expo-location` physically removed from `node_modules` — `expo-modules.config.json` exclusion alone was insufficient, Gradle still tried to autolink it
- Release keystore regenerated for Build 35 (cert SHA-256 `66:3C:CC:...`) — different from Build 34 (`33a1ed7f...`), users must uninstall previous build
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, autoDeploy=yes from GitHub `main` branch
- Supabase project: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key embedded in `expo/lib/supabase-env.ts` and `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts`
- GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, default branch `main`
- GitHub Releases: `v1.4.3-build33` (ID: 354768977), `v1.4.3-build34` (ID: 354781767), `v1.4.3-build35` (ID: 354803487), `v1.5.0` (ID: 352588325), `v1.5.1` (ID: 352589499)
- Owner Supabase user ID: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`

## Next Steps
- **Phase 2**: Fix OpenAI provider/model routing — remove invalid endpoint `https://api.openai.com/v1/gpt-4o`, align `@ai-sdk/openai` version with `ai@6.0.218` (need `@ai-sdk/openai@3.x` for spec v3 compatibility, or upgrade `ai` to v7+ for spec v4), add startup validation, normalize provider failures with trace IDs
- **Phase 3**: Fix execution guard — replace narrative phrase detection with structured result schema validation that runs AFTER worker execution, add explicit execution states (RECEIVED → AUTHORIZED → INSPECTING → PATCHING → TESTING → COMMITTING → DEPLOYING → VERIFYING → VERIFIED/FAILED/BLOCKED)
- **Phase 4**: Owner AI chat recovery — test all 30 chat paths
- **Phase 5-6**: Developer capability audit + route/port/connection audit
- **Phase 7-8**: Add regression tests, run lint/typecheck/build
- **Phase 9-10**: Deploy to Render, send real test message, execute controlled developer task, verify all release gates

## Critical Context
- **Build 35 is the current production release** — verified end-to-end on physical device by owner. CRM dashboard fix confirmed working.
- **P0 AI provider error**: `IVXAIGatewayRequestError` — `Unsupported model version v4 for provider "openai.responses"`. AI SDK 5 only supports models implementing specification version "v2". Origin: `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts:250:22`
- **Lockfile version mismatch**: `ai@6.0.218` depends on `@ai-sdk/provider@3.0.13` and `@ai-sdk/gateway@3.0.142` (spec v3), but `@ai-sdk/openai@4.0.15` depends on `@ai-sdk/provider@4.0.3` (spec v4). Two different `@ai-sdk/provider` versions coexist in the lockfile.
- **Invalid endpoint**: `/health` reports `aiEndpoint: https://api.openai.com/v1/gpt-4o` — model name is being embedded into the endpoint path as if it were an API route
- **Execution guard false positives**: Guard rejects "starting implementation", "I will inspect", "and return only files changed" — blocks worker before execution starts
- **Backend auth**: `resolveIVXAuthenticatedRequest` in `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts` validates bearer token against Supabase, checks `profiles` table for role. Owner bearer token required for all CRM endpoints.
- **No `backend/package.json`** at expected path — need to locate for dependency management

## Relevant Files
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` — AI runtime wrapper (26,765 bytes); imports `generateText`/`streamText` from `ai@6` and `createOpenAI` from `@ai-sdk/openai@4`; origin of provider mismatch error at line 250
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts` — Multi-provider fallback chain; defines `IVXProviderName`, `IVXProviderFailureClass`, `attemptProviderFallback`, `classifyProviderFailure`, `isFailureRetryable`
- `backend/services/ivx-fake-execution-gate.ts` — Fake execution gate; uses narrative phrase detection to block fake execution claims; blocks valid in-progress text like "starting implementation"
- `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — Senior developer narrative gate; replaces chat model answers about dev work with strict BLOCKED or proof block; uses fragile phrase detection
- `backend/api/ivx-developer-proof-standard.ts` — Developer proof ledger API; proof standard endpoints
- `backend/api/owner-only.ts` — Owner-only auth guard; imports `resolveIVXAuthenticatedRequest` from `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts`
- `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts` — Access control module; `resolveIVXAuthenticatedRequest` validates bearer token, loads owner profile, checks role; production Supabase URL and anon key fallbacks
- `expo/app/(tabs)/crm.tsx` — CRM dashboard screen; rewritten for Build 35 with 5 independent `useQuery` hooks, cached-first AsyncStorage badges, per-tile skeleton/error states
- `expo/lib/supabase-env.ts` — Supabase env sanitizer; production URL `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, production anon key
- `expo/app.config.ts` — Expo config; versionCode 35, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_35_CRM_INDEPENDENT_TILES`
